scenarios.name: refactored-payment-calc-module
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the 5-step process — uses git diff to scope, identifies behavior contracts, runs tests against both pre-refactor (via git stash/checkout main) and post-refactor code, and structures tests into preserved-behavior/edge-cases/error-handling describe blocks; baseline writes generic Jest tests against only the current code.

scenarios.name: auth-service-bcrypt-migration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment categorizes the migration as internal restructuring with preserved API, generates contract + side-effect + error-path tests, and verifies equivalence by running the same suite against the old and new code via git checkout; baseline lists generic auth tests without the before/after equivalence check that defines a regression test.
